heading: Revolving fund
label: 7805 Revolving fund
text: The revolving fund shall be deposited in a checking account with the Treasury of the United States. Such amounts thereof as the Secretary may determine to be necessary to establish and maintain operating accounts for the various canteens may be deposited in checking accounts or other interest-bearing accounts in other depositaries selected by the Secretary.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 4205 of this titlesubstituted “Secretary” for “Administrator” in two places.Pub. L. 102–831988— inserted “or other interest-bearing accounts” after “checking accounts”.Pub. L. 100–322
